title: Grastidium alticola
taxonomy: Grastidium alticola is a species of flowering plant in the family Restionaceae. This classification places it within the monocot order and the angiosperm clade. The family Restionaceae is a group of plants commonly known as the restio family, which is native to the Southern Hemisphere. Restionaceae plants are typically found in wetland or marshy environments and are often found in Australia, New Zealand, and parts of Africa. They are characterized by their spike-like inflorescences and narrow, cylindrical leaves.
